signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Resolution Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Resolution Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The SEC has dropped its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs, removing a major overhang that suppressed XRP's price for years and driving a 10% surge to above $1.50 before settling at ~$1.42 in April 2026.[1]  
This regulatory clarity signals institutional adoption potential, with analysts citing it as a catalyst for uptrends targeti

signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full Rollout | YES | MED confidence**  
Ripple USD (RLUSD) launched fully on XRP Ledger and Ethereum as of April 19, 2026, boosting XRPL transaction volume and institutional inflows amid XRP ETF final stages.[2]
